=============
$ Application
=============

#eval foo bar (baz (1 + 1))
#eval foo bar $ baz (1 + 1)
#eval foo bar $ baz $ 1 + 1

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (application
      (application
        (identifier)
        (identifier))
      (parenthesized
        (application
          (identifier)
          (parenthesized
            (binary_expression
              (number)
              (number)))))))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (application
        (identifier)
        (identifier))
      (application
        (identifier)
        (parenthesized
          (binary_expression
            (number)
            (number))))))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (application
        (identifier)
        (identifier))
      (binary_expression
        (identifier)
        (binary_expression
          (number)
          (number))))))

=============
Function Type
=============

#check foo → bar
#check foo → bar → baz

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (arrow
      (identifier)
      (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (arrow
      (identifier)
      (arrow
        (identifier)
        (identifier)))))

============
Product Type
============

#check A × B
#check A × B × C
#check (A × B) × C

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (identifier)
      (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (binary_expression
        (identifier)
        (identifier))
      (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (parenthesized
        (binary_expression
          (identifier)
          (identifier)))
      (identifier))))

=======================
Product Type Precedence
=======================

#check f 3 × C

---

(module
  (hash_command
    (binary_expression
      (application
        (identifier)
        (number))
      (identifier))))

=============================
Pipeline Forward Operator |>
=============================

def pipeline1 := [1, 2] |> List.length

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    body: (binary_expression
      left: (list
        (number)
        (number))
      right: (projection
        term: (identifier)
        name: (identifier)))))

==============================
Pipeline Reverse Operator <|
==============================

def pipeline2 := List.length <| [1, 2]

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    body: (binary_expression
      left: (projection
        term: (identifier)
        name: (identifier))
      right: (list
        (number)
        (number)))))

============================
Pipeline Dot Operator |>.
============================

def pipeline3 := [1, 2] |>.length

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    body: (binary_expression
      left: (list
        (number)
        (number))
      right: (identifier))))

========================
Dollar Operator $
========================

def dollar1 := List.length $ [1, 2]

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    body: (binary_expression
      left: (projection
        term: (identifier)
        name: (identifier))
      right: (list
        (number)
        (number)))))
